data.title: Best Buy online marketplace gains traction as new profit driver
data.description: The consumer electronics retailer's marketplace strategy represents a broader shift toward platform-style revenue streams that rely less on selling inventory directly.

data.title: Voomi Supply raises $10 million to expand B2B ecommerce platform for HVAC
data.description: The company said the funding will support continued development of its technology platform, expansion of its supplier network and growth into additional product categories.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Amazon and Walmart approach agentic commerce differently
data.description: As the two largest online retailers in North America, Amazon and Walmart have made strategic choices in agentic commerce that place them on different paths.

data.title: Beef.com plans digital platform to connect ranchers with pricing and payments
data.description: Beef.com said it aims to position the platform as infrastructure for pricing coordination and transaction settlement within the industry.

data.title: Cart.com raises $180 million to expand logistics network and AI
data.description: Planned investments include workflow automation tools, predictive analytics and artificial intelligence systems designed to help route inventory, reduce shipping times and lower fulfillment costs.
